title: White House touts deals on soybeans and rare earths after Trump-Xi summit, while China talks up tariff cuts
summary_full: The meeting between U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping last week yielded new pacts, though the sides have provided differing details.
summary_public: The meeting between U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping last week yielded new pacts, though the sides have provided differing details.
